_meta.purpose: Complete chronological project history for the HUF-CNT system. One row per milestone, ordered by date.

phases.summary: Pre-S016 HUF repo backed up to HUF-repo-pre-S016-2026-04-09-bak; baseline before the cnt_v2 rebuild.
HUF-Decomposition-Dev/EITT_DECOMPOSITION_FRAMEWORK.md + initial EMPIRICAL_VALIDATION JSON.
Current-Repo/Hs/experiments/Hs-01..Hs-25 scaffolded; CodaWork 2026 talk + handouts.
Earlier release-staging shells; superseded by Current-Repo.
Top-level CoWorker folder organised into Current-Repo/* structure.
AI_REFRESH_2026-04-27.md captures the pre-cnt_v2 Hs state.

amalgamation-tester, archetype-classifier, causal-flow-detector, decomposer, fingerprint-comparator, governor, matrix-diagnostics, reader-adapter, report-generator, sensitivity-engine, tensor-bridge, constant-library.
AI_REFRESH_2026-05-02.md; consolidation of three-program path into one engine.
AI_REFRESH_2026-05-03.md; dual classification (coda_standard / higgins_extensions + composer/review/formatter/provenance).
19 experiments running; full-corpus determinism gate passing.

HUF-CNT-System repository scaffolded; 20 reference experiments verified; HCI-Atlas Phase A+B (analytical plates + tour plates); mission_command from run_experiments; CNT Software System Handbook (10 sections); adapter disclosure; HTML user manual; quickstart examples.
Deterministic PDF backend, native-units helper, PNG/SVG export, comparison atlas, carrier alias map, trajectory windowing, schema validator.
atlas/stage1_v4.py — ILR-Helmert orthogonal triplet, FIXED HLR scale, automatic magnitude factor; Stage 1 calibration fixture (27-point HLR grid).
atlas/OUTPUT_DOCTRINE.md hash-stamped; integer orders only; trajectory aggregates round UP.
atlas/stage2_locked.py — 19-plate Order-2 atlas (System Course Plot, CBS, divergence ranking, etc.) + STAGE2_PSEUDOCODE.md + stage2.R; Stage 2 calibration fixtures (straight=1.0 / loop=0.0).

phases.phase: EMBER 8 countries + World — full Stage 1 + Stage 2 PDFs
phases.summary: atlas/codawork2026_ember/ — per-country PDFs (Stage 1 + Stage 2).

atlas/spectrum_paper.py — cross-dataset paper spectrum (FIXED scales). atlas/plate_time_projector.html — interactive 3D viewer; barycenter z-spine; only valid/known connection lines; COMBINED view across 8 countries with shared PCA frame.

mission_command/modules.py registers stage1 / stage2 / spectrum_paper / projector_html. master_control.json projects[] declares per-project module bundles. tools/run_pipeline.py drives module-only execution.
codawork2026_conference/cnt_demo/ — self-contained: 01_engine, 02_per_country (8+World), 03_combined, 04_calibration, 05_doctrine. README + DEMO_GUIDE.
PUBLIC_TRIAL_READINESS.md (claim-by-claim evidence map); tools/verify_package.py.

engine_config_overrides honoured (kwarg + master_control); INPUT_UNITS adopted; metadata.units block (additive 2.1.0 fields); metadata.engine_config.active_overrides for full audit. 25 PASS / 0 FAIL re-verify after INDEX update.

adapters/markham_budget.py (15y / 8 dept), iiasa_ngfs.py (31y / 7 sector), esa_planck_cosmic.py (17 epochs / 5 component, exact Friedmann), financial_sector.py (252d / 10 GICS sector), chemixhub_oxide.py (24 sample / 7 oxide). Reference corpus 20 → 25.
HS_ADMIN.json + HS_MACHINE_MANIFEST.json rebuilt clean; AI_REFRESH_2026-05-05_v1.1.x.md written; WORKSPACE_AUDIT_2026-05-05.{md,json} produced; PROJECT_HISTORY.json (this file) created.

HUF-CNT-System folded into Current-Repo/Hs/HCI-CNT/. Hs README + EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY + AI_REFRESH + HS_MACHINE_MANIFEST + PROJECT_HISTORY all updated. Three handbook volumes preserved. Three CoDa community papers placed at HCI-CNT/coda_community/. Conference demo + 10-slide PowerPoint at HCI-CNT/conference_demo/. Engine 2.0.4 / Schema 2.1.0 / 25 experiments / determinism gate passes.

phases.phase: Push #15 landed — HCI-CNT integration is live
phases.summary: Commit f38a7c9 pushed to main. Validate Repository #15 PASS in 34 seconds. HCI-CNT now part of github.com/PeterHiggins19/higgins-decomposition. All 6 pre-flight checks of PREPARE_FOR_REPO.json passed prior to push.
